reviews.review_title: Worst VR game I have ever played
reviews.review_description: Where do I even start, first of all, I don't even think I could call this a Capuchin fangame, it's just a straight up copy. Don't even get me started on the movement and gravity, right hand has wayyy more power than the left hand, you practically float when falling, impossible to walk up a ramp without holding it, and there's not even anything interesting to do in the game. I know your game came out only 10 days ago and game dev'ing is rough, but please, do better, better yet put this effort into making something original instead of a copy of something.

developer_response.body: Hello! I am so sorry about your experience. I can assure you this is not a copy, but a very well made recreation/fan game. here at meadow Analytics, we believe it is original because there aren't many Capuchin Fan Games. also based off of you review, we have decided to add infection to the game. if there are anymore concerns, please contact me at puchinapplab@gmail.com. Thanks for your review!
